title: HUMMBL Papers — Governance Infrastructure Research Portfolio
description: Research portfolio for the HUMMBL governance infrastructure program. Papers target a unified thesis: governed AI infrastructure decomposes into a small set of composable primitives spanning auditability (VERUM, TRACE), delegation (DCT, DELEGATION_DEPTH), coordination (COORDINATION_BUS), identity (AGENTIC_IDENTITY), safety (KILL_SWITCH), behavior (COMPLIANCE_THEATER, BKI), and measurement (BASE120).
